about.name: About
about.title: About this app
about.p1: Graphic designer since 2006, I recently obtained my title CDA (Application Developer Designer).
about.p2: I create this app to explore in a fun way the React framework and the principles of Clean Architecture.
about.p3: The challenge: to demonstrate a scalable, tested architecture ready for production.
about.p4: Open to an opportunity to make progress in development.
